# Visa Bunny

> Visa Bunny is a mobile app (iOS) that helps travelers, digital nomads, and expats track their visa stays and avoid overstaying. It provides countdown timers, deadline reminders, and automatic country detection.

## Product Overview

- **Name**: Visa Bunny
- **Website**: https://visabunny.app
- **Platform**: iOS (iPhone)
- **Category**: Travel / Visa Tracking
- **Price**: Free with premium subscription

## What It Does

Visa Bunny tracks how many days you have left on your visa in any country. It supports:

- Visa stay countdown with days remaining
- Automatic country detection via GPS
- Auto-travel: automatically switches your stay when you cross a border (requires opening the app)
- Schengen 90/180 rolling period tracking
- Tax residency day counting
- Multiple passport support
- Visa expiry deadline notifications (7, 14, 30, 60 days before)
- Travel history timeline
- Home screen widget showing days remaining

## Who It's For

- Digital nomads managing stays across multiple countries
- Expats tracking visa renewal deadlines
- Tourists on Schengen, Thai, or other limited-stay visas
- Frequent travelers who need to track 90/180 day rules
- Anyone at risk of visa overstay fines, bans, or deportation

## Key Facts

- Entry day counts as day 1 of the stay
- Visa rules database covers 195+ countries
- All data stored locally on device (privacy-first)
- Location used only with "When In Use" permission
- Does not track location in the background

## Contact

- Support email: bunny@visabunny.app
- Privacy policy: https://visabunny.app/privacy
- Terms of service: https://visabunny.app/terms
